description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof, clean geometric lines, and a minimalist aesthetic. The exterior features a mix of light gray concrete and wood-textured panels, giving it a contemporary look. Large windows are asymmetrically placed, providing ample natural light and visual interest. The backyard includes a rectangular swimming pool surrounded by a paved patio area, and there is a covered garage attached to the side of the house. The property is set on a rectangular plot with a driveway leading to the garage and a grassy lawn surrounding the structure. The main entryway is understated, with a simple door and no prominent porch or decorative columns.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, wood and concrete finishes, large asymmetrical windows, a backyard pool, and an attached garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, attached garage, and a mix of wood and concrete textures.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the angular layout of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring the backyard swimming pool, patio area, and large windows overlooking the pool.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage entrance, pool, and the flat roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flush door with no porch or decorative columns, minimal overhang
